query:
-- Create tenants table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tenants` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `slug` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `domain` VARCHAR(255),
  `stripeCustomerId` VARCHAR(255),
  `stripeSubscriptionId` VARCHAR(255),
  `subscriptionTier` ENUM('trial', 'starter', 'growth', 'scale') DEFAULT 'trial',
  `subscriptionStatus` ENUM('active', 'past_due', 'canceled', 'paused') DEFAULT 'active',
  `trialEndsAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `maxUsers` INT DEFAULT 3,
  `crmType` ENUM('ghl', 'hubspot', 'salesforce', 'close', 'pipedrive', 'none') DEFAULT 'none',
  `crmConnected` ENUM('true', 'false') DEFAULT 'false',
  `crmConfig` TEXT,
  `logoUrl` TEXT,
  `primaryColor` VARCHAR(20),
  `onboardingStep` INT DEFAULT 1,
  `onboardingCompleted` ENUM('true', 'false') DEFAULT 'false',
  `settings` TEXT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Create tenant_roles table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tenant_roles` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantId` INT,
  `name` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `code` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `rubricId` INT,
  `isActive` ENUM('true', 'false') DEFAULT 'true',
  `sortOrder` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`tenantId`) REFERENCES `tenants`(`id`)
);

-- Create tenant_rubrics table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tenant_rubrics` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantId` INT,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `criteria` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `isActive` ENUM('true', 'false') DEFAULT 'true',
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`tenantId`) REFERENCES `tenants`(`id`)
);

-- Create tenant_call_types table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tenant_call_types` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantId` INT,
  `name` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `code` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `rubricId` INT,
  `isActive` ENUM('true', 'false') DEFAULT 'true',
  `sortOrder` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`tenantId`) REFERENCES `tenants`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`rubricId`) REFERENCES `tenant_rubrics`(`id`)
);

-- Create subscription_plans table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscription_plans` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `code` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `description` TEXT,
  `priceMonthly` INT NOT NULL,
  `priceYearly` INT,
  `stripePriceIdMonthly` VARCHAR(255),
  `stripePriceIdYearly` VARCHAR(255),
  `maxUsers` INT NOT NULL,
  `maxCrmIntegrations` INT DEFAULT 1,
  `features` TEXT,
  `isActive` ENUM('true', 'false') DEFAULT 'true',
  `sortOrder` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
